story_points: open with a warm note about church suppers bringing people together
include Sister Elaine's baked macaroni and the way it vanished first
mention Deacon Thomas carrying in pans wrapped in old towels
add my candied yams with brown sugar and nutmeg
note that recipes came with stories, teasing, and Sunday laughter
close by saying these dishes taught younger folks how to serve
